mapper.update: UPDATE project_task SET assignee_id = #{assigneeId}, status = #{status}, version = version + 1, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{taskId} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE project_task SET assignee_id = NULL, status = 'PENDING', version = version + 1, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{taskId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT project_id FROM project_task WHERE id = #{taskId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT planned_start FROM project_task WHERE id = #{taskId} AND deleted = 0 UNION ALL SELECT planned_end FROM project_task WHERE id = #{taskId} AND deleted = 0
